title: Blog with Search
description: Build a blog API. Posts table with title, body, author. POST /api/posts creates. GET /api/posts lists all (support ?search= query param for title search). GET /api/posts/:id gets one post. Validate title and body are required, title max 200 chars.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a Posts table:
  title, required, max 200
  body, required
  author

# Your endpoints here
